suggestions.after:
## Features

- Create, read, update, and delete todos
- Input validation and sanitization
- Secure database queries using parameterized statements
- Comprehensive test coverage
- Premium subscription management
- Payment processing for subscription tiers

issues.description: Mock database always returns empty array, making it impossible to test query results
issues.suggestion: Implement proper mock functionality or use a testing library like jest.mock() to allow test-specific return values

issues.description: Private data field is declared but never used
issues.suggestion: Either implement proper mock data storage using this field or remove it

issues.description: SQL parameter is not validated or used in mock implementation
issues.suggestion: Add basic validation or logging to make debugging easier during development

codeQuality.summary: Simple database interface with a non-functional mock implementation that limits testability.

untestedPaths.reasoning: Database layer is critical infrastructure that should be tested for proper query handling and error scenarios
untestedPaths.suggestedTest: Create src/database.test.ts with tests for: query method execution, error handling, parameter passing, and mock data storage

untestedPaths.reasoning: Core database query method used by all data operations
untestedPaths.suggestedTest: Test query method with various SQL statements and parameters, verify proper return values

testCoverage.summary: No tests exist for the database layer. Mock implementation needs testing to ensure it behaves correctly in test scenarios.

suggestions.description: Implement functional mock database for testing
suggestions.benefits: Makes the mock database testable and allows tests to control return values

refactorings.summary: Database layer needs significant improvement to support proper testing and mock functionality.

issues.description: Card number validation only checks length, doesn't validate using Luhn algorithm
issues.suggestion: Implement Luhn algorithm validation to detect invalid card numbers and prevent fraudulent transactions

issues.description: Credit card numbers are stored/transmitted as plain strings without encryption
issues.suggestion: Use PCI-DSS compliant payment gateway API instead of handling raw card data. If required, encrypt sensitive data immediately

issues.description: Card number stored in database (last 4 digits) without proper audit trail or security measures
issues.suggestion: Add comprehensive payment audit logging with proper security measures and compliance tracking

issues.description: Payment errors are only logged to console, no retry mechanism or proper error handling
issues.suggestion: Implement proper error handling with transaction rollback, user notification, and payment retry logic

issues.description: Expiry date validation has year 2000 bug - will fail for dates beyond 2099
issues.suggestion: Use proper century calculation or full 4-digit year format

issues.description: Processing fee calculation may have rounding errors with floating point arithmetic
issues.suggestion: Use integer arithmetic (cents) for monetary calculations to avoid floating point precision issues

issues.description: Magic numbers for tax rate and processing fee should be configurable
issues.suggestion: Move pricing constants to a configuration file or environment variables

issues.description: SQL query uses string concatenation for features JSON, potential injection risk
issues.suggestion: Ensure JSON.stringify output is properly escaped or use parameterized queries more safely

issues.description: No validation that user exists before checking feature access
issues.suggestion: Add user validation to prevent errors and potential security issues

issues.description: JSON.parse could throw error if database returns invalid JSON
issues.suggestion: Wrap JSON.parse in try-catch and handle parsing errors gracefully

codeQuality.summary: Critical security vulnerabilities in payment processing. No PCI-DSS compliance, raw card data handling, insufficient validation, and missing error handling make this unsuitable for production.

untestedPaths.reasoning: Critical payment processing logic that handles real money transactions. Bugs could result in financial loss or fraud
untestedPaths.suggestedTest: Test valid payments, insufficient amounts, invalid payment details, payment failures, and proper subscription upgrades

untestedPaths.reasoning: Payment validation is the first line of defense against fraud and errors
untestedPaths.suggestedTest: Test valid cards, invalid card numbers, expired cards, invalid CVV, malformed expiry dates, edge cases for date validation

untestedPaths.reasoning: Incorrect pricing calculations could lead to financial discrepancies
untestedPaths.suggestedTest: Test pricing for both tiers, verify tax calculations, verify processing fees, test rounding behavior

untestedPaths.reasoning: Actual payment charging logic must be thoroughly tested to prevent failed transactions
untestedPaths.suggestedTest: Test successful charges, database failures, error handling, proper last-four storage

untestedPaths.reasoning: Subscription upgrade must work correctly to deliver purchased features
untestedPaths.suggestedTest: Test premium vs enterprise upgrades, feature assignment, expiry date calculation, conflict handling

untestedPaths.reasoning: Feature access control determines what users can do - bugs could give unauthorized access
untestedPaths.suggestedTest: Test valid subscriptions, expired subscriptions, missing subscriptions, valid/invalid features, edge cases

untestedPaths.reasoning: Subscription retrieval is used throughout the app for access control
untestedPaths.suggestedTest: Test existing subscriptions, non-existent users, database errors, JSON parsing edge cases

untestedPaths.reasoning: Date validation has edge cases around month boundaries and year rollovers
untestedPaths.suggestedTest: Test cards expiring this month, next month, boundary years (2099, 2100), timezone issues

testCoverage.summary: CRITICAL: Zero test coverage for payment processing logic. This is a major risk for production deployment. All payment functions need comprehensive tests before this PR can be merged.

suggestions.description: Extract Luhn algorithm validation into separate function
suggestions.benefits: Adds industry-standard card validation to detect typos and invalid card numbers

suggestions.description: Use payment gateway SDK instead of raw card handling
suggestions.benefits: PCI-DSS compliance, better security, professional payment processing, no liability for card data

suggestions.description: Use integer arithmetic for money calculations
suggestions.benefits: Eliminates floating point errors in financial calculations, industry standard practice
Easier to maintain and update feature sets, more readable, ensures consistency

refactorings.summary: Major refactoring needed for security and maintainability. Must use proper payment gateway, fix security vulnerabilities, and implement proper error handling before production use.

issues.description: Only testing two utility functions, not testing the main CRUD operations
issues.suggestion: Add tests for createTodo, getAllTodos, getTodoById, updateTodoStatus, and deleteTodo functions

issues.description: No test setup/teardown for database mocking
issues.suggestion: Add beforeEach/afterEach hooks to properly mock database for integration tests

codeQuality.summary: Good test coverage for validation and sanitization functions, but missing tests for actual CRUD operations.

testCoverage.summary: This is a test file. The tests themselves are well-written but incomplete - they don't cover the CRUD operations in todo.ts.

suggestions.description: Add tests for CRUD operations with database mocking
suggestions.benefits: Comprehensive test coverage for all functionality, better confidence in code quality

refactorings.summary: Well-structured test file that needs expansion to cover all CRUD operations.

issues.description: generateId uses Math.random which is not cryptographically secure
issues.suggestion: Use crypto.randomUUID() or crypto.randomBytes() for ID generation to prevent ID prediction attacks

issues.description: createTodo doesn't return the database-persisted object, could cause inconsistencies
issues.suggestion: Query and return the persisted object from database to ensure consistency with stored data

issues.description: updateTodoStatus doesn't verify the todo exists before updating
issues.suggestion: Check if todo exists and return error/throw exception if not found

issues.description: deleteTodo doesn't verify the todo exists before deleting
issues.suggestion: Check if todo exists and return appropriate response (success count or error)

issues.description: getAllTodos has no pagination support
issues.suggestion: Add pagination parameters (limit, offset) to handle large datasets efficiently

codeQuality.summary: Well-structured code with good security practices (parameterized queries, input sanitization), but missing error handling for edge cases and using weak random number generation.

untestedPaths.reasoning: ID generation must be unique and secure

testCoverage.summary: Only validation and sanitization functions are tested. All CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete) lack test coverage, which is a significant gap for core application functionality.

suggestions.benefits: Cryptographically secure IDs, better uniqueness guarantees, prevents prediction attacks
Better error handling, caller knows if update succeeded, prevents silent failures
Scales better with large datasets, reduces memory usage, improves performance

testCoverage.summary: Configuration file does not require tests.

recommendations.description: DO NOT MERGE: The payment processing implementation in src/premium.ts has critical security vulnerabilities. Raw credit card data is handled without PCI-DSS compliance. Must use a payment gateway SDK (Stripe, PayPal, etc.) instead of handling card data directly.

recommendations.category: Testing - Zero Coverage for Business Logic
recommendations.description: DO NOT MERGE: src/premium.ts has 0% test coverage for critical payment processing functions. All payment logic (processPremiumPayment, validatePaymentDetails, calculateSubscriptionPrice, chargeCard) must have comprehensive tests before production deployment.
Card validation only checks length, not validity. Implement Luhn algorithm to detect invalid/typo'd card numbers before processing payments.
Core todo CRUD operations (createTodo, getAllTodos, getTodoById, updateTodoStatus, deleteTodo) have no test coverage. Add comprehensive tests before merging.
Payment errors are only logged to console with no retry mechanism, transaction rollback, or user notification. Implement proper error handling with transaction management.
Expiry date validation has Y2K-style bug (year 2000 + parseInt) that will fail after 2099. Use proper 4-digit year format or century calculation.
MockDatabase implementation returns empty arrays making it non-functional for tests. Implement proper mock with settable return values.
Todo IDs use Math.random() which is not cryptographically secure. Use crypto.randomUUID() to prevent ID prediction attacks.
Floating point arithmetic used for money calculations can cause rounding errors. Use integer arithmetic (cents) for all financial calculations.
Update and delete operations don't verify todo exists before operating. Add existence checks and return appropriate success/error responses.
README doesn't mention the new premium subscription features added in this PR. Update documentation to reflect new functionality.
Add test coverage thresholds to jest.config.js and additional npm scripts (test:coverage, lint) to package.json.
